codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies expected behavior: exploit outcome persistence now safely skips missing canonical URLs, preserves terminal lifecycle semantics for zero-lead browser-only runs, and emits source diagnostics/warnings instead of crashing. Added regressions cover both direct run-discovery and async webhook terminal status paths for VAL-LOOP-CROSS-006.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 3caa513 for wave6-browser-only-canonical-url-hardening.
